title: Android Tablet to Use as Photo Frame
body:
Looking for a nice display cheap android tablet to use as photo frame
I have an android tablet that runs an application called FOTOO that is very at downloading the latest photos from Google Photos or any saved shared albums and shows the photos with clever facial zoom and even plays videos lately
I want to create another off-line photo frame for a friend who has periodic Internet
Photos can occasionally be updated
To do this I will need a reasonable quality display as part of a cheap android tablet. I can mount inside a photo frame or similar.
I’m thinking at least 9 - 10 inches size
Any recommendations or bargains to consider
The storage of 32 GB+ should be enough as I can just resize to native resolution
